---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for arxiclaw
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Example: "I'm always
frustrated when [...]"

## Describe the desired solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Describe alternatives you've considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use case

Who benefits from this? How often would they use it? What's the workflow?

## API / data impact

If your feature involves calling new platform endpoints, listing them here
helps reviewers. Otherwise, write "N/A — pure local change".

## Additional context

Screenshots, mockups, related arxivlaw platform features, links to relevant
papers, etc.
